author: leschuster
description: Copy Markdown and transform it into HTML, Anki, or any custom format. Create custom profiles with versatile templates tailored to your workflow.

manifest.description: Copy Markdown and transform it into HTML, Anki, or any custom format. Create custom profiles with versatile templates tailored to your workflow.

name: Advanced Copy

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - **New:** Add a template for Markdown comments #54

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- **New:** Add options to insert and customize frontmatter properties at the beginning of the copied content. #50 
- **Fixed:** Change options `meta.before` and `meta.after` to TextAreas to allow line breaks.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - **New:** Add support to allow pasting of formatted html (Thanks to @likwidoxigen)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- **New:** Ignore Markdown comments (`%% comment %%`) #32 
- **New:** Add custom HTML tag to ignore certain parts of the MD file when copying (e.g. `<hidden>private</hidden>`) #33 
- **New:** Add global variables for frontmatter fields of a file #40

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- **New:** Add an option to encode HTML entities
- **New:** Add button to create an entirely new profile
- **New:** Add support for tables
- **New:** Change default templates to support tables
- **Bugfix:** Update warning message when there are missing properties

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- **New:** Add additional templates for each Markdown element. Specify an independent template for the first/last occurrence of the element (within its parent) and for an element that is the first/last child of its parent.
- **New:** List-item templates now support special cases for nested items that are first or last children, resolving unnecessary line-break issues when converting Markdown → Markdown. (#12)
- **New:** Modifier functions in templates can transform content dynamically (e.g. convert bold text to UPPERCASE). (#13)
- **Improved:** Redesigned UI settings to accommodate new options.
- **Improved:** Descriptions in settings menu now render from MD to HTML.
- **New:** "Paste settings" button in plugin settings.
- **New:** Ability to lock default templates with a new "Do not update" option. When enabled, your customized default template won't be overwritten on plugin updates.
- **Improved:** When updating default templates, prompt users if custom changes are detected (skipped if "Do not update" is active).
- **Improved:** Update default templates to new changes.
- **Improved:** Enhanced readability of the default HTML and Anki template outputs by adding extra newlines. (Instead of displaying everything in one line.) (#17)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Resolve #9 
- Add support for Markdown highlights using the ==text== syntax
- Add error handling for missing sections/properties in a profile

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Use sentence case in UI instead of Title Case - Remove `

` tag from inline paragraph of default Anki template
